channel.title: Paddle Lines
channel.description: Fresh takes for recreational kayakers and paddlers.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/canoeing is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the storage community this week.

item.title: The state of Boats in 2026
item.description: A field report on boats: where things stand, and what recreational kayakers and paddlers should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Safety without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to safety for recreational kayakers and paddlers — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "first kayak buying guide" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "first kayak buying guide" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why recreational kayakers are rethinking Trips
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how recreational kayakers and paddlers approach trips — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Storage on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in storage — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Safety: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping safety for recreational kayakers and paddlers.
